reason: Backend pre-development checklist and KGTraceVis invariants for future implementation tasks.
Ensures reusable logic stays under src/kgtracevis and scripts/apps remain clients.
KG CSV, in-memory graph, and Neo4j rules are central to the planned roadmap.
Future tasks must preserve schema validation, ambiguity recording, and reviewed-edge safety.
Defines required tests, lint, example runs, and traceability checks.
Guides script output and future logging boundaries for experiments and demos.
Roadmap tasks will add helpers and should search existing patterns before adding abstractions.
Planned work spans schema, KG, scripts, metrics, app, and service boundaries.
